case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-180s recommendationservice metrics. Latency.p50 and p90 show consistent dev=+2.3, +1.6, while mem remains stable. Traces show moderate latency deviations. Root cause is recommendationservice latency.

traces: [traces] id=T0047 window=0-30 edge=frontend>recommendationservice op=ListRecommendations signal=latency.p99 dev=+0.4

reasoner.analysis: Recommendationservice latency.p50/p90 anomalies (dev=+2.3, +1.6) drive root cause. Paymentservice mem dev=+1.7 and adservice latency trace deviations follow as secondary factors.
